0a748b2b9a69: The JackPoker Winter Games Festival has concluded after three weeks of intense tournament action. Over 18,000 unique players competed across 240 events, with total payouts exceeding $2.1 million — a 40% increase from last year's edition.
e9dc44abaca3: The long-awaited JackPoker Mobile 3.0 update is now live on both iOS and Android. The headline feature is full multi-table support — players can now run up to 4 tables simultaneously on mobile with a redesigned tile-view layout.
b0e8a48515ca: JackPoker has expanded its cryptocurrency deposit options with three new tokens: Solana (SOL), Polygon (MATIC), and Toncoin (TON). The additions bring the total number of supported crypto assets to 9, joining existing options like Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, USDC, Litecoin and Dogecoin.
9611afc806bf: The March edition of JackPoker's Bonus Bonanza tournament series features 620 scheduled events across 31 days with a combined guaranteed prize pool exceeding $1.25 million. Highlights include the $109 High Roller Sunday ($50K GTD), the $22 Weekday Grind ($15K GTD running Monday through Friday), and a brand new $5.50 Turbo PKO series with $8K daily guarantees.
9c33d44be27f: JackPoker has officially surpassed 500,000 registered player accounts, a milestone reached just 14 months after the platform's public launch. To celebrate, the company is running a week-long "500K Festival" featuring $100,000 in additional freeroll prizes, a special Lootbox promotion with guaranteed 500% minimum multipliers for all active players, and a one-time 50% reload bonus available to every account that has made at least one previous deposit.
f18e3d910718: JackPoker has launched a comprehensive hand replayer and statistics dashboard directly inside the client. Players can now review every hand they've played with a visual replayer that shows bet sizing, pot odds, and opponent actions in an animated timeline.
0afd56855c37: JackPoker's flagship weekly tournament, Big Bang Sunday, has received a permanent guarantee increase from $30,000 to $45,000. The $33 buy-in event remains one of the best value propositions in online poker, with an overlay ratio that consistently exceeds the guarantee.
98801ea5847d: Players who reach Gold VIP status and above now have access to instant withdrawal processing for e-wallet and cryptocurrency cashouts. Previously, all withdrawals went through a standard 24-hour review period.
